prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-5INFOLDINGKNIFE-BLK Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Thumb Assist Folding Knife Window Punch Seat Belt Cutter - Black Description: Be prepared on the go with the ASR Outdoor 5" Thumb Assisted Folding Knife.

This knife features a 3.5" blade, and extends to an overall length of 8.25" when unfolded. Once folded, the knife with handle is just 5" in length, making it easy to bring with you just about anywhere.

The blade is constructed of durable 440 stainless steel, and the handle comes with a belt clip, seat belt cutter and window punch in case of an emergency situation. Make sure you keep one of these in your car, backpack, boat or camping gear at all times. Search Terms: hunting knives every day pocket knife window punches seat belt cutters survival rescue EMT first response folding woodland spring assisted tactical emergency self defense protection escape tools camo camouflage outdoor hiking camping travel Features: - ASR Outdoor Thumb Assisted Folding Knife - Black - 3.5" Blade | 5" Folded | 8.25" Unfolded - Window Punch on Handle - Seat Belt Cutter & Belt Clip - Material: 440 Stainless Steel === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 5" Black Thumb Assist Folding Knife

anthropic.title_differentiation: 35" Blade, Window Punch, Seat Belt Cutter, Belt Clip, 440 Stainless Steel, EDC Survival Tool

openai.title_differentiation: 35" 440 Stainless Steel Blade, Thumb Assist Opening, Window Punch, Seat Belt Cutter, Belt Clip
